channel.title: _Metapages on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in _Metapages on James Akl

item.title: Posts
item.description: Articles Matrix calculus notation · Discussing the ‘matrix derivative’ in formal settings. QP and least squares · Analyzing the relationship between QP and least squares. Reading spatial transforms · Ways to interpret homogeneous (rigid-body) transform. A tour of robot mechanics · Broad glide over robot kinematics and dynamics. Defining a robot · Attempt to answer “What is a robot?” in a prescriptive manner. Projects Convex analysis and optimization problems · Collection of interesting problems with my proofs and solutions.

item.title: Research
item.description: Some of my research contributions are disclosed below. Publications All preprint material is subject to the corresponding publisher's copyright. [PDF] Cut Sequencing Algorithm for Safely Disassembling Large Structures, 2023 IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC). James Akl; Sumanth Pericherla; Berk Calli. [PDF] Vision-Based Oxy-Fuel Torch Control for Robotic Metal Cutting, 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). James Akl; Yash Patil; Chinmay Todankar; Berk Calli. [PDF][Dataset] CNN-Based Task State Estimation for Safer Automation of Oxy-Fuel Metal Cutting,

item.title: Resume
item.description: My professional and educational backgrounds are summarized below. View my resume For other information, please request directly at james-akl@outlook.com.
